title: Announcements — in-app + Discord webhook
description: Tenant announcements for belajar-with-rahmanef.com R12: instructor+ post an announcement (create), members read the feed newest-first (list), and each new post is fanned out to the community Discord via an internal action. P0: tenants.discordWebhookUrl is read ONLY inside the internal action (never an arg, never a public return value); the create mutation schedules the action with ctx.scheduler.runAfter(0). Reads the shared memberships table via requireTenantRole; never imports another feature. AnnouncementsView mounts at /t/[slug]/pengumuman.

app#alpha: canManage = isInstructorPlus(membership.role) resolved from the tenants barrel
